articles.title: XRP surged past $3 for the first time since 2018
articles.description: XRP momentarily smashed through the $3 barrier today, a dramatic comeback not seen since early 2018. Though it quickly corrected back to $2.97. The crypto, often at the center of legal and regulatory drama, surged by more than 31% in just the first two weeks of the year. XRP’s trading volume exploded, climbing 141% in […]

articles.title: Chainlink Thriving On New Partnership, Price Rallies 10%
articles.description: Chainlink teamed up with one of the emerging Turkish financial transformation services leaders, BTguru, a move that has seen its native token go parabolic. Chainlink price pump followed soon after. This collaboration aims to accelerate the use of tokenized securities by regionally regulated institutions. Chainlink will help BTguru overcome some persistent issues in the tokenized […] The post...

articles.title: Sony Group Launches Soneium Mainnet, Says Layer-2 Blockchain Aims To Unlock New Possibilities for Creators
articles.description: The Ethereum (ETH) layer-2 protocol developed by consumer electronics and entertainment giant Sony Group is now live. Sony Group says the Soneium Mainnet, which is developed by Sony Block Solutions Labs and powered by Optimism Foundation’s Superchain technology, is now operational. The Japanese conglomerate announced the development of Soneium in August of 2024. The consumer […] The post Sony...

articles.title: XRP Surges as Wider Crypto Market Remains Flat. Why is it Up Today?
articles.description: The price of the native token of the XRP Ledger is up more than 6% over the last 24-hour period while most other major cryptocurrencies are relatively flat, with bitcoin being up around 0.5%, ether moving up just 0.07%, and BNB even dropping 0.4% XRP is outperforming the wider cryptocurrency market over various factors including […]

articles.title: JUST IN: 🇲🇾 Malaysia's Prime Minister says Bitcoin and crypto "would revamp the financial world. We should not sit idly by and wait, and later be forced to do so after others have done it already.”
Bitcoin inflows under Trump spark new $249K BTC price target for 2025
articles.description: BTC price upside is primed to reach a minimum of $145,000 over the coming year as pro-Bitcoin US policy takes shape.

articles.title: Thailand considers approving Bitcoin ETFs
articles.description: The Thai SEC is evaluating the approval of the country’s first Bitcoin ETFs while the government plans to pilot cryptocurrency payments in Phuket. The post Thailand considers approving Bitcoin ETFs appeared first on Atlas21.

articles.title: FTX’s Solana Liquidation Strategy: $32.35M January Redemption
articles.description: FTX/Alameda has completed its January 2025 monthly Solana (SOL) redemption, withdrawing 182,421 SOL tokens valued at $32.35 million from its staking address. According to blockchain data analyzed by researcher EmberCN, the tokens were distributed across 20 different addresses. This was in continuation of the established pattern of monthly redemptions that began in November 2024. FTX’s […] The...
